description: Part of the citizen watches brand from Tokyo, Q& Q is the largest selling analogue watch brand in more than 150 countries. True to its promise of International quality, Q& Q is known for its legendary Japanese assurance of quality, great pricing and avant-garde designs. This watch is to be worn on the right hand. Case diameter: 38 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Round Stainless steel round case Black synthetic strap with a tang clasp White dial with metallic hands Branding at the 12 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters or in light rain
